description: Composition White kurti with a bateau neckline, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, a fabric tape on the upper bust, a half-buttoned placket with brass buttons, and pink and blue ethnic print with a distressed look Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This piece of art by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and pumps for a casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtis Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
